name: Android App Builder with GitHub Integration (Jan 21 at 18:55:49)

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://api.github.com/repos/' + $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.github_owner + '/' + $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.github_repo + '/actions/workflows/' + $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.workflow_file + '/dispatches' }}
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { 'ref': $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.github_branch, 'inputs': { 'app_name': $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.app_name, 'web_url': $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.web_url } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { 'status': 'success', 'message': 'App build started', 'app_name': $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.app_name, 'web_url': $('Prepare Webhook Data').item.json.web_url } }}

parameters.errorMessage: Failed to commit build.gradle.kts to GitHub. Please check your GitHub credentials and repository settings.
Failed to commit strings.xml to GitHub. Please check your GitHub credentials and repository settings.
Failed to trigger GitHub Actions workflow. Please check your workflow file name and GitHub credentials.

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
